---
title: "Contact"
---

<div class="page-header">
<div class="kicker">Contact</div>

# Contact

<p class="lead">For research-related questions, collaborations, invited talks, or student projects, feel free to contact me.</p>
</div>

::: {.feature}
### Email

`recker [at] match.uni-hannover.de`

I write the address in this form to reduce automated scraping. Please replace `[at]` with `@`.
:::

## Profiles

<div class="button-row">
<a class="button primary" href="https://github.com/TobiasRecker">GitHub</a>
<a class="button" href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-1632-0538">ORCID</a>
<a class="button" href="https://de.linkedin.com/in/tobias-recker-14349521b">LinkedIn</a>
<a class="button" href="https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=57216780652">Scopus</a>
<a class="button" href="https://www.match.uni-hannover.de/en/institute/team/tobias-recker">Institute profile</a>
</div>

## Open to

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.card}
### Research collaborations
Cooperative mobile robots, mobile manipulation, multi-robot control, and construction automation.
:::

::: {.card}
### Talks and discussions
Research talks, project discussions, and exchange on industrial mobile robot systems.
:::

::: {.card}
### Student projects
Topics related to mobile manipulation, path planning, control, and system integration.
:::
:::
